somali.explore_drag_the_protractor_name_the_a: Sahmi — jiid cabbiraha xagasha, magacaw xagalka
somali.acute_90_right_90_obtuse_90_180_straig: Fiiqan < 90°, qumman = 90°, duudduuban 90–180°, toosan = 180°, dib-u-noqod > 180°. Cabbiraha xagasha waxaa la alifay qiyaastii 1801-kii; nooca badh-goobada ah wali wuxuu ka shaqeeyaa fasal kasta oo joomatari ah.
somali.estimation_builds_spatial_sense_precis: Qiyaasku wuxuu dhisaa dareenka bannaanka; cabbiraadda saxda ahi waxay dhistaa caadada cabbiraha xagasha. Common Core 4.MD.5–7: xaglaha oo ah jajab wareeg buuxa ah (1/360 wareeg).
somali.complementary_sum_to_90_supplementary_: Dhammaystirku wuxuu isku darsamaa 90°; kaabistu 180°; xaglaha isdhaafsani waa siman yihiin; xaglaha gudaha ee kala-geddisani way isle'eg yihiin marka xariiqyadu isbarbar socdaan. Afartan xaqiiqo waxay furaan inta badan caddaymaha dugsiga dhexe.
somali.bisect_cut_in_half_the_construction_wi: Kala-badhtan = laba u kala jar (dhisidda kambaska + mastarada waxay ku taal Euclid Buugga I, Tilmaanta 9). Qalab casri ah: cabbiraha xagasha, minshaarka miter, theodolite — dhammaan fikrad isku mid ah, oo la habeeyay.
somali.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips: Guji si aad u hesho talooyin xagal oo gaar ah!
somali.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips_2: Guji si aad u hesho talooyin xagal oo gaar ah!
somali.look_at_the_angle_on_the_protractor_nu: Fiiri xagalka ku yaal cabbiraha xagasha (tiradii waa qarsoon tahay). Waa immisa daraja?
somali.opposite_angles_formed_by_intersecting: Xaglaha iska soo horjeeda ee ay sameeyaan xariiqyada isgoysa; had iyo jeer siman
somali.angles_that_share_a_common_vertex_and_: Xaglaha wadaaga isku dhundhun iyo isku dhinac
somali.two_rays_overlap_exactly_no_rotation: Labada fallaadh si sax ah bay isku dul saaran yihiin. Wareeg ma jiro.
somali.less_than_a_right_angle_pizza_slice_le: Ka yar xagal qumman. Goosin bitso, "ka yar afargees".
somali.exactly_90_corner_of_a_square_perpendi: Si sax ah 90°. Geeska afargees. Xariiqyo qumman.
somali.between_right_and_straight_wider_than_: Inta u dhaxaysa qumman iyo toosan. Ka ballaadhan geeska afargees.
somali.half_rotation_the_two_rays_form_a_stra: Nus wareeg. Labada fallaadh waxay sameeyaan xariiq toosan.
somali.greater_than_a_straight_angle_measure_: Ka weyn xagal toosan. Cabbir "dibadda" xagalka.
somali.complete_turn_the_two_rays_overlap_exa: Wareeg dhamaystiran. Labada fallaadh si sax ah bay isku dul saaran yihiin (sida 0°, laakiin waa lagu wareegay dhammaan).
somali.interactive_geometry_references_pick_a: Tixraacyo joomatari oo is-dhexgal ah — dooro mawduuc.
somali.interior_angle_sum_n_2_180_for_any_n_s: Wadarta xagalka gudaha = (n − 2) × 180° badan-gees kasta oo n-dhinac ah. Xagal kasta oo dibadda ah oo badan-gees CAADI ah = 360°/n. Wadarta xaglaha dibadda had iyo jeer = 360°.
somali.soh_cah_toa_sine_opp_hyp_cosine_adj_hy: SOH-CAH-TOA: Sine = Ka-soo-horjeeda/Hypotenuse, Cosine = Dhinac/Hypotenuse, Tangent = Ka-soo-horjeeda/Dhinac. Hawlaha trig waxay muujiyaan saamiyada dhinacyada saddex-geeska qumman; waxaa lagu fidiyay dhammaan xaglaha iyada oo la adeegsanayo goobada cutubka.
somali.these_angles_their_trig_values_are_wor: Xaglahan + qiimayaashooda trig way mudan yihiin in la xafido — waxay ka soo muuqdaan si joogto ah xisaabta, fiisikiska, iyo injineernimada.
somali.1_rad_180_57_296_1_180_0_01745_rad_1_g: 1 rad = 180/π ≈ 57.296°. 1° = π/180 ≈ 0.01745 rad. 1 gon = 0.9°. Xisaabiyayaal badan waxay leeyihiin habka daraja/raadyaan — hubi inaad ku jirto habka saxda ah!
somali.angle_problem_solving_shortcuts: ⚡ Jidadka gaaban ee xallinta dhibaatada xagalka
somali.bearings_measured_clockwise_from_north: Jihooyinka waxaa loo cabbiraa SI SAACAD U SOCOTA laga bilaabo waqooyi. Kambaska caadiga ah ee 16-dhibic wuxuu leeyahay 22.5° u dhexeeya jihooyinka isku xiga.
somali.three_views_of_the_same_trigonometric_: Saddex aragti oo isku dejin trigonometrik ah. Jiid sliderka xagalka (ama dhererka munaaradda) — matalaad kastaa isla mar bay is-cusbooneysiisaa. Kadibna qaado imtixaanka dhibaatada-rogan: xallo cabbir dhab ah adigoo isticmaalaya hal matalaad kaliya.
somali.change_the_angle_and_watch_all_three_u: Beddel xagalka oo daawo saddexdaba oo wada cusbooneysiinaya — kanu waa waxa "fikrad isku mid ah, saddex matalaad" macnaheedu yahay.
somali.pisa_is_roughly_56_m_tall_leaning_4_to: (Pisa waxay ku dhow dahay 56 m dherer, janjeersan ≈ 4° maanta)
somali.each_quiz_gives_you_partial_info_use_t: Imtixaan kastaa wuxuu ku siinayaa macluumaad qayb ah. Isticmaal xiriirrada aad kor ku ogaatay si aad u xisaabiso qiimaha maqan.
somali.tip_rearrange_tan_opp_adj_if_you_know_: Talo: dib-u-habee tan(θ) = ka-soo-horjeeda/dhinac — haddaad ogtahay θ iyo hal dhinac, waxaad xallin kartaa kan kale. Haddaad labada dhinac ogtahay, qaado arctan.
somali.quantity_with_both_magnitude_and_direc: Tiro leh xoog IYO jiho labadaba. Waxaa loo sawiraa fallaadh. Tusaale: xawlaha, xoogga, barakac.
somali.scalar_just_a_number_mass_temperature_: Scalar = tiro keliya (mad, heerkul, waqti). Vector = xoog + jiho.
somali.place_tail_of_second_at_head_of_first_: Dhig dabada kan labaad madaxa kan hore. Natiijadu = dabada kan hore ilaa madaxa kan labaad.
somali.place_tails_together_diagonal_of_paral: Isku dhig dabooyinka. Xarriiqda toosan ee mustatiilka barbar-siman = natiijada.
somali.vector_v_at_angle_v_v_cos_v_y_v_sin: Vector v xagalka θ: vₓ = v·cos θ, v_y = v·sin θ.
somali.magnitude_1_v_v_v_often_called_the_dir: Xoog 1. v̂ = v / |v|. Inta badan waxaa loo yaqaan "jihada" v.
somali.a_b_a_b_cos_gives_scalar_zero_when_per: a·b = |a||b|cos θ. Waxay bixisaa scalar. Eber marka ay qummanaan yihiin. Taban marka xagalku > 90°.
somali.a_b_a_b_sin_n_gives_vector_perpendicul: a×b = |a||b|sin θ · n̂. Waxay bixisaa vector QUMMAN labadooda. Xoog = aagga mustatiilka barbar-siman.
somali.curl_fingers_from_a_to_b_thumb_points_: Farihiisa ka duub a ilaa b. Suulku wuxuu tilmaamayaa jihada a×b. (Iskuduwayaal gacan-midig.)
somali.c_a_c_b_generates_a_plane_or_line_of_v: c₁·a + c₂·b. Waxay abuurtaa diyaarad (ama xariiq) faktoyaal ah.
somali.newton_s_2nd_law_f_ma_net_force_is_vec: Sharciga 2aad ee Newton: F = ma. Xoogga guud waa wadarta vector ee dhammaan xoogagga.
somali.airplane_heading_wind_vector_ground_ve: Jihada diyaaradda + vectorka dabaysha → xawaaraha dhulka (wadarta vector).
somali.equilateral_triangle_square_regular_he: Saddex-gees dhinac-siman, afargees, lix-gees caadi ah. Kaliya badan-geesyada caadiga ah ee dul-daboola diyaaradda.
somali.interior_angle_must_divide_360_triangl: Xagalka gudaha waa inuu qaybiyaa 360°. Saddex-gees 60° (×6), afargees 90° (×4), lix-gees 120° (×3). Shan-geeska 108° ma qaybsho 360° → keligiis ma turxaamin karo.
somali.8_in_total_combine_multiple_regular_po: 8 guud ahaan. Isku dar badan-geesyo caadi ah oo badan; habraac isku mid ah dhundhun kasta.
somali.aperiodic_tiling_never_repeats_exactly: Turxaan aan-xilliyeed — waligiis si sax ah kuma soo noqdo. Simmaan 5-jibbaaran. Waxay dhiirrigelisay helitaanka quasicrystals.
somali.hexagonal_tiling_minimizes_total_perim: Turxaanka lix-geesku wuxuu yareeyaa wareega guud ee aag la siiyay. Waxaa cadeeyay Hales (1999). Sababta shinnidu u isticmaasho lix-geesyada.
somali.each_region_points_closest_to_one_seed: Gobol kastaa = dhibcaha ugu dhow hal barta "abuur" ah. Waxay ka soo muuqataa dabeecadda (dhibcaha geriga, dildilaaca dhoobada, habaynta unugyada).
somali.on_a_hyperbolic_plane_regular_pentagon: Diyaarad hyperbolik ah, shan-geesyada caadiga ah (iyo qaabab kale oo badan) WAY turxaamin karaan. Taxanaha M.C. Escher ee "Circle Limit".
somali.colored_squares_that_must_match_neighb: Afargeesyo midab leh oo ay tahay inay u-dhigmaan deriska geesaha. Waxay ku dayan karaan mishiinka Turing → dhibaatada turxaanku guud ahaan lama go'aamin karo.
somali.a_single_tile_that_aperiodically_tiles: Hal turxaan oo si aan-xilliyeed ah u turxaamiya diyaaradda (qaababka "hat" iyo "spectre"). Helitaan muhiim ah oo dhawaan la sameeyay.
somali.in_a_right_triangle_a_b_c_where_c_is_t: Saddex-gees qumman, a² + b² = c² halka c uu yahay hypotenuse-ka. Kooxaha tirooyinka (a, b, c) ee tan buuxiya waxaa loo yaqaan saddex-guud Pythagorean. Saddex-guud "aasaasi" ma laha wax wadaag ah.
somali.for_positive_integers_m_n_with_no_comm: Tirooyin togan m > n oo aan wax wadaag lahayn oo aan labaduba kelin ahayn, a = m² − n², b = 2mn, c = m² + n². Isku day m=2, n=1 → (3,4,5).
somali.3d_solids_volumes_and_surface_areas: ⬢ Adkeyaal 3D — mugga iyo aagga dusha sare
somali.circle_has_most_area_for_a_perimeter: Goobadu waxay leedahay aagga ugu badan wareega la siiyay
somali.isoperimetric_inequality_4_a_p_equalit: Sinnaan-la'aanta isoperimetric: 4πA ≤ P². Sinnaan kaliya goobooyinka. Sababta xumbada saabuunta + meerayaashu u wareegsan yihiin.
somali.sphere_has_most_volume_for_a_surface_a: Kuraydhku waxay leedahay mugga ugu badan aagga dusha la siiyay
somali.3d_version_of_above_single_bubbles_are: Nooca 3D ee kore. Xumbooyinka keli ah waa kuraydho; xumbooyinka isku dhafan waxay ku kulmaan xaglo 120°.
somali.regular_hexagons_tile_most_efficiently: Lix-geesyada caadiga ah ayaa si ugu hufan u turxaamiya
somali.honeycomb_conjecture_proven_1999_by_ha: Malaha shinnida (waxaa cadeeyay 1999 Hales): turxaanka lix-geesku wuxuu leeyahay dhererka geeska guud ee ugu hooseeya aagga u eg qaybinta kasta.
somali.cannot_be_deformed_without_changing_si: Lama qalloocin karo iyada oo aan la beddelin dhererka dhinacyada. Sababta buundooyinka + saqafyada u isticmaalaan saddex-geesyada.
somali.squares_stack_densely_100: Afargeesyadu si cuf-dhan ah bay isu dul saaraan (100%)
somali.square_tiles_fill_the_plane_with_no_ga: Turxaannada afargeesku waxay buuxiyaan diyaaradda daldaloolo la'aan. Sidoo kale mustatiilada + barbar-simanka.
somali.circles_tile_poorly: Goobooyinku si xun bay u turxaamaan
somali.hexagonal_packing_of_circles_fills_90_: Isku-xirka lix-geesle ee goobooyinku wuxuu buuxiyaa ~90.7% diyaaradda (ugu fiican ee suurtogal ah). Isku-xirka afargeesle kaliya ~78.5%.
somali.fcc_hcp_both_achieve_74_density_kepler: FCC + HCP labaduba waxay gaadhaan ~74% cuf-isku-jir (malaha Kepler, la cadeeyay 2014 Hales).
somali.only_5_in_3d_tetrahedron_cube_octahedr: Kaliya 5 3D: tetrahedron, kuyub, octahedron, dodecahedron, icosahedron. (Plato ayaa ka hadlay.)
somali.4_vertices_6_edges_4_faces_minimum_3d_: 4 dhundhun, 6 geeso, 4 weji. Qaabka 3D ee ugu yar.
somali.for_sphere_inscribed_in_cylinder_h_2r_: Kuraydh ku qoran dhululubo (h = 2r): V_kuraydh = 2/3 × V_dhululubo. (Natiijada Archimedes uu jeclaa.)
somali.16_vertices_32_edges_24_faces_8_cells_: 16 dhundhun, 32 geeso, 24 weji, 8 unug. Waxaa loo furi karaa 8 kuyub (sida Salvador Dalí).
somali.single_sided_surface_cut_down_middle_l: Dusha hal-dhinac ah. Dhexda ka jar → wareeg keli ah oo ka dheer. Ku jar 1/3 → laba giraan oo isku xiran (mid Möbius).
somali.closed_non_orientable_surface_inside_o: Dusha xiran ee aan-la-jiheyn karin. Gudaha = dibadda. Waxaa lagu samayn karaa 3D kaliya iyada oo is-goysa.
somali.curve_of_constant_width_not_a_circle_c: Qalooc ballaac joogto ah (maaha goobo!). Loox baa lagu giri karaa saddex kabaal Reuleaux si siman. Daloolisyada ayaa isticmaala.
somali.two_parallel_polygons_rotated_360_2n_c: Laba badan-gees oo barbar-siman oo la wareejiyay 360°/2n, oo isku xiran saddex-geesyo. Tetrahedron waa antiprism-ka ugu fudud.
somali.has_chirality_left_right_handed_forms_: Waxay leedahay chirality — qaabab gacan-bidix + gacan-midig. Mid ka mid ah labada adke Archimedean ee chiral ah (kan kale waa snub dodecahedron).
somali.equation_z_xy_straight_lines_lie_on_it: Isle'egta z = xy. Xariiqyo toosan ayaa ku jira laba qoys. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa Pringles + saqafyo qaar.
somali.gomboc_2006_is_first_known_mono_monost: "Gömböc" (2006) waa kan ugu horreeya ee mono-monostatic loo yaqaan — hal dheelitir xasilloon + hal aan xasilloonayn. Sida Weeble is-toosiya.
somali.cannot_tile_plane_alone_gaps_but_7_egg: Keligiis ma turxaamin karo diyaaradda — daldaloolo. Laakiin 7 qaab-ukun ah waxay sameeyaan kutlo lix-gees u eg.
somali.common_in_crystals_cube_nacl_octahedro: Caadi ah crystals-ka: kuyub (NaCl), octahedron (dheeman, fluorite), dodecahedron (pyrite, garnet).
somali.truncated_icosahedron_60_carbons_like_: Icosahedron la gooyay. 60 kaarboon. Sida qaabka kubbadda cagta. Waxaa la helay 1985.
somali.helical_10_5_base_pairs_per_turn_major: Wareeg leh, ~10.5 lammaane saldhig ah wareeg kasta. Godad weyn + yaryar. Dhexroor joogto ah ~2 nm.
somali.hexagonal_prisms_with_rhombic_bottoms_: Prism lix-geesle oo hoos rhombik ah leh. Shinnidu si miyir-qab ah uma xisaabiso — biofiisikigu si dabiici ah ayuu u yareeyaa aagga dusha.
somali.drop_spaghetti_at_random_average_numbe: Si aan kala sooc lahayn u tuur spaghetti — celceliska tirada isgoysyada = (L/πd) × π × n. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu qiyaaso π fasalka.
somali.surprising_shape_facts: ◇ Xaqiiqooyin la yaab leh oo qaab ah
somali.study_of_flags_comes_from_latin_vexill: Barashada calammada. Waxay ka timid Laatiinka vexillum (calanka ay qaadaan fardooleyda Roomaanka).
somali.keep_it_simple_a_child_can_draw_from_m: Ka dhig mid fudud (ilmo baa xusuus ka sawiri kara), isticmaal astaan macno leh, 2-3 midab aasaasi ah, ha ku qorin xaraf ama shaabad, noqo mid gaar ah.
somali.most_common_2_3_e_g_france_germany_us_: Kan ugu badan: 2:3 (tusaale, Faransiiska, Jarmalka). Mareykanku waa 1:1.9. UK waa 1:2. Qaar aan caadi ahayn: Iswiiserlaan 1:1, Nepal aan-afargees ahayn.
somali.symbols_added_to_flag_stars_crosses_an: Astaamaha lagu daray calanka (xiddigo, iskutallaabooyin, xayawaan). Ereybixinta heraldik ayaa qeexda meesheeda.
somali.upper_left_rectangle_about_1_4_the_fla: Mustatiilka kore-bidix (qiyaastii 1/4 calanka). Xiddigaha Mareykanku halkan bay galaan. Australia, NZ sidoo kale waxay isticmaalaan naqshadda canton.
somali.hoist_side_attached_to_pole_fly_opposi: Hoist = dhinaca ku xiran tiirka. Fly = dhinaca ka soo horjeeda (xorta ah).
somali.red_courage_revolution_blood_blue_ocea: Casaan = geesinimo, kacaan, dhiig. Buluug = badweyn, cirka, xorriyad. Cagaar = dhul, dabeecad, Islaam. Caddaan = nabad, daahirnimo. Jaalle/Dahab = maal, qorrax.
somali.flying_flag_upside_down_where_asymmetr: Calanka la duqeeyay (halka aan simman) = tusaale ceeb ama gargaar; calanka badhtan-tiir la dhigo = baroor-diiq.
somali.light_blue_with_map_un_or_compass_nato: Buluug khafiif ah oo leh khariidad (UN) ama kambas (NATO). Si ula-kac ah waxay ka fogaadaan astaamaha qaran/diineed.
somali.flags_are_codified_geometry_every_nati: Calammadu waa joomatari qodan. Calan kasta oo qaran wuxuu leeyahay tilmaamo sax ah: saamiga cabbirka, koodhadhka midabka, meelaha astaamaha, xaglaha xiddigaha.
somali.selected_national_organizational_flags: Calammo qaran + urur oo la doortay
somali.x_12_means_x_inches_rise_per_12_inches: X:12 macnaheedu waa X inji oo kor u kaca 12 inji oo socod toosan ah.
somali.sun_99_86_jupiter_0_095_everything_els: Qorraxda = 99.86%. Jupiter = 0.095%. Wax kasta oo kale = 0.045%.
somali.149_597_870_700_m_defined_exactly_ligh: 149,597,870,700 m. Si sax ah loo qeexay. Iftiinku wuxuu qaataa ~8.3 daqiiqo si uu u gudbo 1 AU.
somali.9_461_10_m_distance_light_travels_in_1: 9.461×10¹⁵ m. Fogaanta uu iftiinku ku socdo 1 sannad Julian ah.
somali.3_26_light_years_distance_at_which_1_a: ~3.26 sano-iftiin. Fogaanta halka 1 AU uu ka muuqdo 1 arcsecond.
somali.165_au_2024_fastest_human_made_object_: ~165 AU (2024). Shayga ugu dheereeya ee aadanuhu sameeyay ee ka baxaya nidaamka qorraxeed. Wali xog buu soo dirayaa.
somali.620_million_tons_of_h_he_every_second_: ~620 milyan tan oo H → He ilbiriqsi kasta. Waxay lumisaa ~4 milyan tan oo tamar ah (E = mc²).
somali.stream_of_charged_particles_400_800_km: Durdur ka kooban qaybo-yaryar caashan. ~400-800 km/s Dhulka agtiisa. Waxay abuurtaa hillaacyada + waxay farraysaa dabo-dambeedka majaajilada.
somali.axial_tilt_drives_seasons_tilt_90_mean: Janjeedhka dhidibku wuxuu keenaa xilliyada. Janjeedh > 90° macnaheedu waa wareeg dib-u-socod (Venus, Uranus, Pluto).
somali.can_you_cross_each_of_the_7_bridges_of: Ma ka tallaabi kartaa 7-da buundo ee Königsberg mid kasta hal mar keliya?
somali.no_euler_proved_1736_you_need_each_nod: Maya. Euler wuxuu caddeeyay (1736) inaad u baahan tahay dhundhun kastaa inuu leeyahay darajo dhaban, marka laga reebo laga yaabee 2 dhundhun oo darajo kis ah. Königsberg wuxuu lahaa 4 dhundhun oo darajo kis ah. Waxay aasaastay aragtida garaafyada.
somali.using_only_compass_straightedge_constr: Adiga oo isticmaalaya kambas + mastar kaliya, dhis afargees aag isku mid ah goobo la siiyay.
somali.impossible_is_transcendental_lindemann: Suurtogal maaha. π waa transcendental (Lindemann 1882). Lagama dhisi karo hawlo C+S oo xaddidan.
somali.construct_a_cube_with_twice_the_volume: Dhis kuyub mug laba jibbaar ah oo kuyub la siiyay leh adiga oo isticmaalaya kambas + mastar.
somali.impossible_requires_2_which_is_algebra: Suurtogal maaha. Waxay u baahan tahay ∛2, oo ah aljebra darajo 3, laakiin C+S waxay kaliya soo saartaa tirooyin darajo 2ⁿ ah.
somali.divide_an_arbitrary_angle_into_3_equal: U qaybi xagal aan go'an saddex qaybood oo siman iyada oo la adeegsanayo kambas + mastar.
somali.impossible_in_general_some_specific_an: Suurtogal maaha guud ahaan. Xaglo gaar ah (tusaale, 180°) waa suurtogal. Origami WUU saddex-qaybin karaa xaglo aan go'an.
somali.given_two_circles_how_do_they_relate: Marka la siiyo laba goobo, sidee bay isula xiriiraan?
somali.5_cases_separate_externally_tangent_in: 5 xaaladood: kala-gooni, taabasho-dibadeed, isgoysa (2 dhibic), taabasho-gudeed, mid gudaha kan kale.
somali.can_every_planar_map_be_colored_with_4: Ma khariidad kasta oo diyaaradle ah waxaa lagu midabayn karaa 4 midab si aan gobollada isku xiga u wadaagin midab?
somali.yes_proven_by_appel_haken_1976_first_m: Haa. Waxaa caddeeyay Appel + Haken (1976) — aragtida ugu horreysay ee waaweyn ee lagu caddeeyo kaalmo kombuyuutar.
somali.what_path_from_a_to_b_b_lower_minimize: Jid kee oo A ilaa B (B hooseeya) ayaa yareeya waqtiga shay hoos u sii socda hoos culeyska?
somali.cycloid_posed_by_bernoulli_1696_solved: Cycloid. Waxaa soo bandhigay Bernoulli (1696). Waxaa xalliyay Newton habeen keliya + 4 kale oo ay ku jiraan Leibniz.
somali.cut_a_circular_pizza_into_8_sectors_wi: U jar bitso wareegsan 8 qaybood iyada oo la marayo hal barta (aan xaaje ahayn bartamaha). Qaybaha kala-daba-galaa waxay leeyihiin aag siman.
somali.true_for_any_odd_multiple_of_4_sectors: Run u ah qayb kasta oo ah tiro-kis ku dhufan 4. Waxay u shaqeysaa 8, 12, 16, ...
somali.for_what_radii_of_intersecting_circles: Nuscabbirro kee oo goobooyin isgoysa ah ayaa qaabka-dayaxa ("lune") + muraayadda uu aag isku mid ah leeyahay?
somali.ratio_depends_solved_analytically_roma: Saamigu wuu ku xiran yahay — si falanqeyn ah loo xalliyay. Joomatari jacayl oo ka yimid sheeko 1942.
somali.intersection_of_two_perpendicular_cyli: Isgoyska laba dhululubo oo qumman oo nuscabbir isku mid ah.
somali.has_4_vertices_looks_like_a_4_faced_cu: Wuxuu leeyahay 4 dhundhun, wuxuu u eg yahay barkin 4-weji leh. Mug = (16/3)r³.
somali.drop_a_needle_of_length_l_onto_paralle: Ku tuur irbad dhererkeedu L yahay xariiqyo barbar-siman oo d kala-jira. Waa maxay itimaalka ay xariiq ka gudubto?
somali.2l_d_for_l_d_method_to_compute_by_drop: 2L/(πd) markii L ≤ d. Hab lagu xisaabiyo π iyadoo la tuurayo irbado!
somali.can_you_cut_a_circle_into_pieces_rearr: Ma jari kartaa goobo qaybo oo dib u habeyn karaa afargees aag isku mid ah?
somali.yes_laczkovich_1990_with_10_pieces_cho: Haa (Laczkovich 1990) — ~10⁵⁰ qaybood. Waxay u baahan tahay axioma doorashada. Lama isticmaali karo goosin maqas-nooc ah; qaybahu waa yaab-badan yihiin.
somali.can_you_cut_a_ball_into_pieces_rearran: Ma jari kartaa kubbad qaybo oo dib u habeyn karaa laba kubbadood oo isle'eg?
somali.yes_requires_axiom_of_choice_non_measu: Haa — waxay u baahan tahay axioma doorashada + qaybo aan-la-cabbiri-karin. Way ka soo horjeeddaa dareenka laakiin xisaabtan ahaan waa sax.
somali.soap_film_minimal_surface: Dusha ugu yar ee dahaadhka saabuunta
somali.why_do_soap_films_take_certain_shapes: Maxay dahaadhyada saabuunta u yeeshaan qaabab gaar ah?
somali.they_minimize_surface_area_catenoid_be: Waxay yareeyaan aagga dusha sare. Catenoid (u dhexeeya giraamada), xudduudda Plateau (isgoysyada). Waxay soo saartaa joomatari qurux badan.
somali.simplest_regular_tiling_schl_fli_symbo: Turxaanka caadiga ah ee ugu fudud. Astaanta Schläfli {4,4}.
somali.3_hexagons_around_each_vertex_6_3_hone: 3 lix-gees dhundhun kasta hareerihiisa. {6,3}. Shinni-guri. Kan ugu hufan.
somali.octagons_squares_4_8_8_hispanic_coloni: Sideed-geesyo + afargeesyo (4.8.8). Qaababka turxaanka Hispanic gumeysi.
somali.squares_triangles_3_3_4_3_4_chiral_has: Afargeesyo + saddex-geesyo (3.3.4.3.4). Chiral — waxay leedahay gacan-ka-hooseyn.
somali.just_rhombi_can_be_combined_to_make_pe: Kaliya rhombi. Waa la isku dari karaa si loo sameeyo turxaanka Penrose.
somali.two_rhombi_fat_thin_aperiodic_never_re: Laba rhombi (buuran + dhuuban). Aperiodik — waligiis kuma soo noqdo. Simmaan 5-jibbaaran.
somali.kite_dart_aperiodic_with_5_fold_symmet: Kite + dart. Aperiodik oo leh simmaan 5-jibbaaran.
somali.right_triangles_arranged_in_pinwheels_: Saddex-geesyo qumman oo lagu habeeyay pinwheels. Aperiodik. Waxaa loo isticmaalay turxaannada Federation Square (Melbourne).
somali.single_polygon_that_tiles_aperiodicall: Hal badan-gees oo si aperiodik ah u turxaamiya. Helitaan muhiim ah oo dhawaan sameeyeen Smith, Myers, Kaplan, Goodman-Strauss.
somali.improvement_on_hat_uses_only_direct_no: Horumar ku yimid hat — wuxuu isticmaalaa turxaanno toos ah oo keliya (aan la milicsin).
somali.5_sided_tiles_found_in_cairo_street_pa: Turxaanno 5-dhinac ah. Waxaa laga helaa waddooyinka Cairo. Turxaan kastaa wuxuu leeyahay 4 xagal oo ~120° + mid 90°.
somali.use_2_vertex_types_14_distinct_ones_so: Waxay isticmaalaan 2 nooc oo dhundhun ah. 14 kala duwan (qaar waa la murmaa). Ka adag Archimedean.
somali.divide_plane_into_cells_closest_to_eac: U qaybi diyaaradda unugyo ugu dhow barta "abuur" kasta. Waxay ka soo muuqataa dabeecadda (dhibcaha geriga, xumbo).
somali.triangle_mesh_with_property_that_no_po: Shabag saddex-geesle oo leh sifada aan barina ku jirin goobo-wareega saddex-gees kasta. Dhaca Voronoi.
somali.15_distinct_convex_pentagon_shapes_can: 15 qaab oo shan-gees godan oo kala duwan ayaa turxaamin kara diyaaradda. Kii ugu dambeeyay waxaa la helay 2015 (Mann, McLoud, Von Derau). Marjorie Rice waxay 4 heshay iyada oo hiwaayad ah 1970-meeyadii.
somali.heptagons_impossible_in_euclidean_tile: Toddob-geesyada (aan suurtogal ahayn Euclidean) waxay turxaamiyaan diyaaradda hyperbolik iyagoo 3 dhundhun kasta hareerihiisa ah. Waxaa sawiray Escher.
somali.square_tiles_with_curves_or_diagonals_: Turxaanno afargeesle oo leh qalooco ama xariiqyo toosan. Jiho aan kala sooc lahayn → qaabab habaas u eg.
somali.latitude_longitude_in_decimal_degrees_: Loolka + goobaha ee daraja tobanle. Lool: 0° = dhulbaraha, ±90° = tirtiryada. Goob: 0° = Greenwich, ±180° = agagaarka xariiqda taariikhda caalamiga ah.
somali.practical_angle_standards: 🛠 Halbeegyada xagalka ee la taaban karo
somali.at_each_vertex_you_need_3_polygons_who: Dhundhun kasta, waxaad u baahan tahay 3+ badan-gees oo wadarta xagalkoodu ka yar tahay 360° (haddii kale siman ama aan suurtogal ahayn). Kaliya 5 isku-dar ayaa u shaqeeya badan-geesyada caadiga ah.
somali.v_e_f_2_holds_for_every_convex_polyhed: V − E + F = 2 waxay u shaqaysaa badan-wejiile godan kasta (oo ay ku jiraan dhammaan 5-da adke Platonic).
somali.connecting_face_centers_of_a_platonic_: Isku xirka bartamayaasha wejiyada adke Platonic wuxuu bixiyaa "laba-jibbaarkiisa". Kuyub ↔ octahedron; dodecahedron ↔ icosahedron; tetrahedron ↔ isaga qudhiisa.
somali.13_semi_regular_solids_same_arrangemen: 13 adke nus-caadi ah — habraac isku mid ah dhundhun kasta, laakiin noocyo badan-gees oo badan. Waxaa ku jira icosahedron la gooyay (qaabka kubbadda cagta).
somali.4_regular_star_polyhedra_with_pentagra: 4 badan-wejiile xiddig-nooc caadi ah oo leh wejiyo ama dhundhummo pentagram ah. Aan-godnayn.
somali.start_with_triangle_on_each_side_repla: Ku bilow saddex-gees. Dhinac kasta, ku beddel saddexdiisa dhexe laba dhinac oo saddex-gees ka yar. Ku celi. Wareeg aan dhammaad lahayn, aag xaddidan.
somali.start_with_triangle_remove_middle_smal: Ku bilow saddex-gees. Ka saar saddex-geeska dhexe (ka yar). Ku celi saddex-gees kasta oo hadhay. Cabbirka Hausdorff log(3)/log(2) ≈ 1.585.
somali.remove_middle_third_of_segment_repeat_: Ka saar saddex-meelood-dhexe qaybta. Ku celi qayb kasta oo hadhay. Aan-la-tirin-karin oo aan dhammaad lahayn laakiin dhererka guud waa eber.
somali.points_c_where_iterating_z_z_c_stays_b: Dhibcaha c halka ku-celinta z = z² + c ay xaddidan tahay. Faahfaahin aan dhammaad lahayn heer kasta oo weynayn. Waxaa la helay 1980.
somali.for_each_c_points_z_where_iterating_z_: c kasta, dhibcaha z halka ku-celinta z = z² + c ay xaddidan tahay. c kastaa wuxuu bixiyaa kooxda Julia oo kala duwan; wadajir waxay turxaamiyaan kooxda Mandelbrot.
somali.fold_a_strip_of_paper_in_half_repeated: Laallaabi jeeska warqad si isdaba joog ah; laab kasta ka kala fur 90°. Ama beddelaad soo noqnoqda oo qaybaha.
somali.iterated_function_system_random_select: Nidaam hawl-celis ah. Doorasho kala sooc la'aan ah oo 4 maab affine ah waxay soo saartaa qaab fern.
somali.fractional_dimension_coastline_1_2_1_3: Cabbir jajab ah. Xeebtu ~1.2-1.3 iyadoo ku xiran dalka. Waxay qabtaa "qallafsanaanta" ka baxsan cabbirrada tirada dhan.
somali.defining_property_strict_self_similari: Sifo qeexaya. Is-ekaansho adag (Koch) ama tirakoob (xeebo).
somali.coastlines_trees_lungs_bronchi_blood_v: Xeebo, geedo, sambabbo (bronchi), xididdada dhiigga, shabakadaha wabiyada, silsiladaha buuraha, daruuraha, hillaac.
somali.flat_plane_parallel_postulate_holds_an: Diyaarad siman. Mabda'a xariiqyada barbar-simani wuu shaqeeyaa. Xaglaha saddex-geesku waxay isku darsamaan si sax ah 180°.
somali.surface_of_sphere_triangle_angles_sum_: Dusha kuraydhka. Xaglaha saddex-geesku waxay isku darsamaan IN KA BADAN 180°. Xad-dhaafku wuxuu la barbar socdaa aagga. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa marin-habaynta.
somali.saddle_shaped_surface_triangle_angles_: Dusha qaab-kore ah. Xaglaha saddex-geesku waxay isku darsamaan IN KA YAR 180°. Barbar-siman badan ayaa maraya bar aan xariiq ku jirin.
somali.shortest_paths_on_a_surface_straight_l: Jidadka ugu gaaban ee dusha. Xariiqyo toosan (Euclidean); goobooyin waaweyn (kuraydh); xariiqyo hyperbolik.
somali.largest_circles_on_a_sphere_equator_me: Goobooyinka ugu waaweyn ee kuraydhka. Dhulbaraha + goobaha. Duulimaadyada diyaaraduhu waxay raacaan jidadka goobada-weyn.
somali.euclidean_0_spherical_positive_hyperbo: Euclidean = 0. Kuraydhle = togan. Hyperbolik = taban. Qalooca ayaa go'aamiya joomatariga.
somali.on_sphere_of_radius_r_triangle_area_r_: Kuraydh nuscabbirkiisu R yahay, aagga saddex-geeska = R² × (wadarta xagalka − π).
somali.positions_on_earth_s_surface_use_spher: Meelaha dusha Dhulka waxay isticmaalaan joomatari kuraydhle (ama si sax ah, ellipsoidal).
somali.nyc_to_tokyo_is_shortest_via_the_arcti: NYC ilaa Tokyo waxay ugu gaaban tahay Arctic-ga, maaha si toos ah bari — taasi waa goobada-weyn.
somali.spacetime_is_curved_by_mass_energy_geo: Waqti-bannaanka waxaa qalloociya cuf-tamar. Geodesics-ka maraya waqti-bannaan qalloocan AYAA ah jidadka shayada si xor ah u dhacaya.
somali.a_vertical_or_angled_gnomon_casts_a_sh: "Gnomon" toosan ama xagal leh ayaa hadh tuura. Marka Dhulku wareego, hadhku wuxuu ku dhaqaaqaa calaamadaha.
somali.for_accuracy_gnomon_must_be_parallel_t: Si loo helo sax, gnomon-ku waa inuu barbar-siman yahay dhidibka Dhulka — xagalka toosan = loolka deegaanka.
somali.dial_plate_perpendicular_to_gnomon_par: Saxanka wejiga qumman gnomon-ka (barbar-siman dhulbaraha). Xariiqyada saacaddu si siman u kala fog 15°.
somali.dial_plate_parallel_to_ground_hour_lin: Saxanka wejiga barbar-siman dhulka. Xariiqyada saacaddu si siman uma kala foga — qaacido: tan(xagalka xariiqda saacadda) = sin(loolka) × tan(xagalka saacadda).
somali.dial_on_a_wall_hour_lines_depend_on_wa: Saxan derbi. Xariiqyada saacaddu waxay ku xiran yihiin azimuth-ka derbiga + loolka.
somali.sundial_time_differs_from_clock_time_b: Waqtiga saacadda qorraxdu wuu ka duwan yahay waqtiga saacadda ilaa ~16 daqiiqo sannadka oo dhan. Sababtoo ah wareega ellipsoidal ee Dhulka + janjeedhka dhidibka.
somali.figure_8_trace_of_sun_s_position_at_sa: Raad-sawir 8-nambar ah oo booska qorraxda ah waqti saacadeed isku mid ah maalin kasta sannad. Waxaa lagu muujiyaa saacadaha qorraxda ee horumarsan.
somali.sundial_shows_local_apparent_solar_tim: Saacadda qorraxdu waxay muujisaa WAQTIGA QORRAXEED ee muuqda ee deegaanka. Way ka duwan tahay waqtiga rayidka ah goob-ahaan gudaha aagga waqtiga + DST.
somali.very_precise_sundials_with_corrections: Saacado qorraxeed oo aad u sax ah oo leh saxitaan qaacidada waqtiga + goobaha. Sax ilbiriqsiyo.
somali.a_line_divided_so_that_whole_larger_la: Xariiq loo qaybiyay si dhan : weyn = weyn : yar. (a+b)/a = a/b = φ.
somali.ratio_of_consecutive_fibonacci_numbers: Saamiga tirooyinka Fibonacci ee isku xiga wuxuu u dhawaadaa φ: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21 → 21/13 ≈ 1.615.
somali.long_side_short_side_remove_a_square_r: Dhinac dheer / dhinac gaaban = φ. Ka saar afargees → mustatiilka hadhay sidoo kale waa dahabi.
somali.logarithmic_spiral_with_growth_factor_: Wareeg logarithmic ah oo leh factor-koraadka φ rubuc-wareeg kasta. Waxaa lagu qiyaasaa afargeesyada + qaansooyinka Fibonacci.
somali.ratios_of_pentagram_diagonals_to_sides: Saamiyada xariiqyada toosan ee pentagram-ka ilaa dhinacyada = φ. Pythagoras wuu ogaa.
somali.spiral_arrangements_in_sunflowers_pine: Habaynta wareega ee gabbaldayaha, tuubbada geedaha, qolofka nautilus. Waxay ka tarjumaysaa isku-xirka ugu wanaagsan ee meristem-ka koraya.
somali.often_claimed_in_parthenon_mona_lisa_e: Inta badan waxaa lagu sheegaa Parthenon, Mona Lisa, iwm — sheegashooyinka badankood lama taageerin. Farshaxanka saami-dahabi dhab ah: isticmaal ula-kac ah oo qarnigii 20-aad (Le Corbusier, Dali).
somali.long_believed_humans_find_golden_ratio: Muddo dheer waxaa la aaminsanaa in bini'aadamku u arko saamiga dahabiga inuu yahay kan ugu qurux badan. Caddaynta adag waa ka daciifsan tahay sida sheekooyinka caanka ah u tilmaamaan.
somali.1_1_1_1_1_1_most_irrational_number_slo: φ = 1 + 1/(1 + 1/(1 + 1/(...))). Tirada ugu aan-macquulka-ahayn — jajab-sii-socda ugu tartiib u soo koobma.
somali.active_research_area_can_solve_cubic_e: Aag cilmi-baaris firfircoon. Wuxuu xallin karaa isle'egyada kubbo (aan suurtogal ahayn kambas + mastar keligood). Ku xiran aljebra.
somali.at_any_flat_foldable_vertex_mountain_f: Dhundhun kasta oo siman oo la laallaabi karo, |# laallaabyada buurta − # laallaabyada dooxada| = 2.
somali.at_a_flat_foldable_vertex_alternating_: Dhundhun siman oo la laallaabi karo, xaglaha kala-daba-galaa ee ku wareegsan dhundhunka waxay isku darsamaan 180°.
somali.standard_paper_can_be_folded_in_half_7: Warqadda caadiga ah waxaa laba loo laallaabi karaa ~7 jeer. Laallaab kastaa wuxuu labanlaabaa dhumucda. 7-da kadib, warqaddu aad bay u adkaataa. Diiwaanka (qalab gaar ah + warqad weyn): 12 laallaab.
somali.flat_sheet_can_fold_into_virtually_any: Xaanshi siman wuxuu ku laallaaban karaa ku dhawaad qaab kasta oo 3D ah haddii laallaabyo ku filan la sameeyo. Origami-ga casriga ah aad buu u adag yahay.
somali.james_webb_space_telescope_sunshield_f: Gaashaanka-qorraxda ee James Webb Space Telescope oo loo laallaabay furitaanka (mabaadi'da origami), oo hawada lagu furay.
somali.folded_efficiently_to_fit_in_compartme: Si hufan loo laallaabay si uu ugu qummado qeybta, si dhaqso ah u furma.
somali.origami_inspired_medical_stents_fold_t: Stent-yada caafimaad ee origami-ka dhiirrigeliyay waxay u laallaabmaan yaraan galitaan, oo ku ballaadhaan xididka.
somali.parallelogram_based_fold_lets_large_su: Laallaab ku salaysan mustatiil barbar-siman wuxuu u oggolaadaa dusha weyn (looxa qorraxeed) inuu ka baxo xidhmo yar hal jiid.
somali.cuts_allowed_in_addition_to_folds_used: Goosin ayaa la oggol yahay marka lagu daro laallaabyada. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa buugaagta soo-boodaya + qaab-dhismeedka sayniska.
somali.parallel_lines_converge_to_vanishing_p: Xariiqyada barbar-simani waxay isugu soo baxaan dhibcaha luminta. 1-dhibic (waddo hoos loo eegayo), 2-dhibic (geeska dhisme), 3-dhibic (munaarad kor loo eegayo).
somali.where_parallel_lines_appear_to_meet_on: Halka xariiqyada barbar-simani ay u muuqdaan inay isku yimaadaan cirifka. Waxaa go'aamiya booska daawadaha + jihada xariiqda.
somali.horizontal_line_at_viewer_s_eye_height: Xariiq toosan oo joog isha daawadaha ah. Dhammaan dhibcaha luminta way ku dul yaalliin (xariiqyada barbar-siman dhulka).
somali.objects_pointing_at_viewer_appear_comp: Shayada u soo jeedda daawadaha waxay u muuqdaan kuwo cufan. Sawirid gacan daawadaha loo soo jeediyay = caqabad.
somali.divide_canvas_photo_into_9_equal_secti: U qaybi shiraaca/sawirka 9 qaybood oo siman. Dhig mowduucyada isgoysyada si loo helo halabuur firfircoon.
somali.camera_tilted_off_horizontal_creates_u: Kamarad ka janjeedhsan toosnaanta waxay abuurtaa welwel, xasillooni-la'aan, firfircooni.
somali.sun_angle_determines_shadow_length_dir: Xagalka qorraxdu wuxuu go'aamiyaa dhererka hadhka + jihada. Xagal hooseeya (saacadda dahabiga) = hadhad dheer + midab diirran.
somali.brunelleschi_1413_demonstrated_mathema: Brunelleschi (~1413) wuxuu muujiyay muuqaalka toosan ee xisaabeed. Alberti ayaa habeeyay (1435).
somali.distant_objects_appear_bluer_less_dist: Shayada fog waxay u muuqdaan kuwo buluug-badan + aan cad sababtoo ah kala-firdhinta jawiga.
somali.some_traditions_use_specific_angles_ra: Dhaqammo qaar ayaa isticmaala xaglo + saamiyo gaar ah (qaababka joomatari ee Islaamka, mandala-yada Hindida, kaniisadaha gothic).
somali.mathematical_artist_impossible_objects: Farshaxane xisaabeed. Shayo aan suurtogal ahayn (saddex-geesyada Penrose), turxaamin, joomatari hyperbolik.
somali.folding_angles_crease_patterns_produce: Xaglaha laallaabka + qaababka laallaabku waxay soo saaraan farshaxan 3D ah oo ka yimid warqad siman.
somali.curves_formed_when_a_plane_intersects_: Qalooca la sameeyo marka diyaaraddu ay goyso koon (laba-jibbaaran). Xagalka diyaaradda ilaa dhidibka koonku wuxuu go'aamiyaa nooca qalooca.
somali.the_only_5_convex_regular_polyhedra_al: Kaliya 5-da badan-wejiile godan caadi ah. Dhammaan wejiyadu waa badan-geesyo caadi ah oo isle'eg, tiro isku mid ah oo isugu timaadda dhundhun kasta.
somali.shapes_that_exhibit_self_similarity_at: Qaabab muujiya is-ekaansho heer kasta. Waxaa curiyay Benoit Mandelbrot (1975) oo ka soo qaatay Laatiinka fractus, "jaban".
somali.geometries_on_curved_surfaces_euclid_s: Joomatari dusha qalloocan. Mabda'a xariiqyada barbar-siman ee Euclid ma shaqeeyo. Waxaa la helay 1820-meeyadii (Lobachevsky, Bolyai, Gauss).
somali.projecting_curved_earth_onto_a_flat_ma: Saadaasha Dhulka qalloocan ee khariidad siman had iyo jeer wax bay qalloocisaa — xaglaha, aagagga, fogaanta, ama qaababka. Saadaal kastaa waxay u wanaagsan tahay isticmaal kala duwan.
somali.many_popular_claims_about_the_golden_r: Sheegashooyin badan oo caan ah oo ku saabsan saamiga dahabiga ee farshaxanka, dhismaha, iyo "quruxda" waa kuwo aan la taageerin ama dib loo abuuray. Sifooyinka xisaabeed waa dhab + qurux badan; sheegashooyinka dhaqameed inta badan maaha.
somali.origami_connects_geometry_to_engineeri: Origami wuxuu isku xiraa joomatariga iyo injineernimada, bayoolajiga, iyo naqshadeynta. Aragtiyaha xisaabeed ayaa maamula laallaabyada suurtogalka ah.
somali.many_athletic_skills_depend_on_launch_: Xirfado ciyaareed badan ayaa ku xiran xaglaha bilowga. Kan caadiga ah "45° ayaa ugu fiican" waa run kaliya waxyaabaha la tuuray + ku degay isku joog isku mid ah (dabaysha la'aanteed).
